ogTitle: Wermatong vs Werri Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wermatong and Werri Beach.
heading: Wermatong vs Werri Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wermatong, New South Wales and Werri Beach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Werri Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Wermatong (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wermatong or Werri Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wermatong has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Werri Beach scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wermatong scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Werri Beach scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wermatong or Werri Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Werri Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
